message.reasoning_content:

Output ONLY a JSON array of 2-4 short strings, each a self-contained facet in the text's own terms - no invention, no overlap. If the text has only one facet, return one element."

The theory rests on two pillars. The first is the pseudospectral viability margin δ_KA, defined via resolvent norm supremum, which governs how perturbations propagate through the system operator and determines cumulative regret indepen"
